overview: Jund Wildfire is a Pauper midrange deck that leverages sacrifice outlets and token generation to control the board while applying consistent pressure. By cycling creatures through Fanatical Offering and Ichor Wellspring, it generates value and direct damage to outlast opponents. The strategy relies on efficient removal and tempo plays to stabilize before transitioning into a token-heavy late game.
win_conditions: Overwhelm the opponent with a board of Zombie tokens generated by Ichor Wellspring
Deal lethal direct damage to the opponent using Fanatical Offering on high-power creatures
Outvalue the opponent by repeatedly sacrificing creatures for removal and token generation

keep_criteria: Hands with at least two creatures and one removal spell
Hands featuring early mana acceleration or multiple Fanatical Offering copies
Hands containing Ichor Wellspring with early creature sources
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking interaction or creature sacrifices
Hands with only late-game cards and no early pressure
Hands missing black mana for Ichor Wellspring or Cast Down

early_game: Prioritize casting removal on threatening aggro creatures to preserve board presence
Play cheap creatures early to feed Fanatical Offering for tempo swings
Ensure mana availability to cast Cast Down or hold back for Wellspring
mid_game: Begin cycling creatures through Fanatical Offering to deal direct damage and trigger Ichor Wellspring
Use Cast Down to clear the path for token advancement or to trigger additional value
Balance aggression with board control, sacrificing high-power creatures for maximum impact
late_game: Flood the board with Zombie tokens to overwhelm opponent removal
Use Fanatical Offering on multiple tokens or large threats to close out the game
Maintain mana discipline to keep Ichor Wellspring active and respond to late-game threats

key_cards.name: Fanatical Offering
key_cards.role: Sacrifice outlet and direct damage engine
key_cards.notes: Target high-power creatures to deal significant damage to the opponent or remove key threats while triggering Ichor Wellspring

key_cards.name: Ichor Wellspring
key_cards.notes: Pay the cost whenever possible to create Zombie tokens that apply pressure and provide additional sacrifice fodder

key_cards.name: Cast Down
key_cards.notes: Use on high-impact threats or creatures you plan to sacrifice later to maximize Wellspring triggers and maintain board parity

sequencing_tips: Always hold up black mana when expecting a creature death to activate Ichor Wellspring
Prioritize sacrificing creatures with Fanatical Offering before using Cast Down to maximize token generation
Save Cast Down for threats that would otherwise stall your token strategy or deal lethal damage

matchups.advice: Use Cast Down early to slow down aggressive starts, then sacrifice your own creatures with Fanatical Offering to race or stabilize.
Apply early pressure with creatures and direct damage from Fanatical Offering before they establish a wide board.
Race efficiently by sacrificing high-power creatures for damage while using Ichor Wellspring to outvalue their removal.

common_threats: Fast aggressive creatures that bypass early removal
Board wipes that clear token boards
Card draw engines that outpace token generation
